content: It’s happening... it’s really happening! Experience Shrek 5 only in theaters summer 2027. ______ Next summer, DreamWorks Animation invites audiences on a thrilling, magical new comedy adventure from one of the most beloved global animated franchises of all time: Shrek 5. Comedy legends Mike Myers, Oscar® nominee Eddie Murphy and Cameron Diaz return to their signature roles as Shrek, Donkey and Fiona. Emmy winning superstar Zendaya (The Odyssey, Dune franchise) joins the cast as Shrek and Fiona’s daughter Felicia, along with Marcello Hernandez (Saturday Night Live, Happy Gilmore 2) and Skyler Gisondo (Superman, Booksmart) as Felicia’s brothers, Fergus and Farkle. Shrek 5 is directed by acclaimed filmmakers and Shrek franchise veterans Conrad Vernon and Walt Dohrn. Vernon was a member of the directing team on the Academy Award® nominated Shrek 2 as well as on DreamWorks Animation’s Madagascar 3: Europe’s Most Wanted and Monsters vs. Aliens. Vernon has also provided the voice of Shrek fan-favorite Gingerbread Man, aka “Gingy,” across all titles in the Shrek Universe. Dohrn worked on the second and third Shrek films as a writer and artist and as Head of Story on the fourth film. Dohrn also voiced the character of Rumpelstiltskin in Shrek Forever After. Dohrn served as co-director on the first Trolls film and directed Trolls World Tour and Trolls Band Together. The film is produced by returning producer Gina Shay (Trolls franchise), who produced Shrek Forever After and by Illumination CEO and Academy Award® nominee Chris Meledandri (the Super Mario, Despicable Me and Minions franchises). The film is co-directed by Brad Ableson (Minions: The Rise of Gru, The Simpsons). Social Handles Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/shrek/ Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Shrek/ X: https://twitter.com/shrek Threads: https://www.threads.com/@shrek TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@shrek Official Site: https://www.Shrek.com
chineseContent: 正在发生……真的正在发生！仅限 2027 年夏季在影院体验《怪物史莱克 5》。 ______ 明年夏天，梦工厂动画将邀请观众体验一场来自有史以来最受欢迎的全球动画系列之一的惊心动魄、神奇的全新喜剧冒险：《怪物史莱克 5》。喜剧传奇人物迈克·梅尔斯、奥斯卡® 提名者艾迪·墨菲和卡梅隆·迪亚兹将回归他们的标志性角色：怪物史莱克、驴子和菲奥娜。艾美奖得主超级巨星赞达亚（《奥德赛》、《沙丘》系列）加入演员阵容，饰演史莱克和菲奥娜的女儿菲利西亚，马塞洛·埃尔南德斯（《周六夜现场》、《快乐吉尔摩 2》）和斯凯勒·吉桑多（《超人》、《Booksmart》）饰演菲利西亚的兄弟弗格斯和法克尔。 《怪物史莱克 5》由著名电影制作人、《怪物史莱克》系列老将康拉德·弗农 (Conrad Vernon) 和沃尔特·道恩 (Walt Dohrn) 执导。弗农是获得奥斯卡金像奖提名的《怪物史瑞克 2》以及梦工厂动画公司的《马达加斯加 3：欧洲头号通缉犯》和《怪物大战外星人》的导演团队成员之一。弗农还为史莱克宇宙的所有游戏中深受史莱克粉丝喜爱的姜饼人（又名“Gingy”）配音。多恩在《怪物史莱克》第二部和第三部中担任编剧和艺术家，并在第四部电影中担任故事负责人。多恩还为《怪物史莱克》中的小矮人角色配音。多恩担任第一部《魔发精灵》电影的联合导演，并执导了《魔发精灵世界巡回演唱会》和《魔发精灵乐队》。本片由曾制作过《怪物史莱克》的回归制片人吉娜·谢伊（《魔发精灵》系列）和照明娱乐公司首席执行官兼奥斯卡金像奖提名者克里斯·梅勒丹德里（《超级马里奥》、《神偷奶爸》和《小黄人》系列）制作。这部电影由布拉德·艾布尔森（《小黄人：格鲁崛起》、《辛普森一家》）联合执导。社交手柄 Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/shrek/ Facebook：https://www.facebook.com/Shrek/ X：http
